Module com.example.escritura_rapida
Package com.example.escritura_rapida.model

Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.escritura_rapida.model.GameManager
public class GameManager extends Object
Encapsulates game state and core scoring/leveling rules.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameManager()
    Creates a new game manager with default settings.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    correctWord(String word)
    Applies rules for a correct word: increments score, tracks streaks, levels up for new words, and reduces time after each five consecutive correct words.
    void
    decreaseTime()
    Decreases the per-word timer down to a minimum threshold.
    int
    getCorrectWords()
     
    int
    getIncorrectWords()

    getScore()

    void
    incorrectWord(String word)
    Applies rules for an incorrect word: increments mistakes and breaks streak.
    boolean
    isMaxLevelReached()
     
    boolean
    mistakeGameOver()
    Determines if the game should end due to too many mistakes.
    void
    resetGame()
    Resets all game state for a new session.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameManager

      public GameManager()
      Creates a new game manager with default settings.

  • Method Details

    • resetGame

      public void resetGame()
      Resets all game state for a new session.

    • correctWord

      public boolean correctWord(String word)
      Applies rules for a correct word: increments score, tracks streaks, levels up for new words, and reduces time after each five consecutive correct words.
      Parameters:
      word - the word that was typed correctly
      Returns:
      true if the level increased for a previously unmissed word

    • incorrectWord

      public void incorrectWord(String word)
      Applies rules for an incorrect word: increments mistakes and breaks streak.
      Parameters:
      word - the word that was typed incorrectly

    • mistakeGameOver

      public boolean mistakeGameOver()
      Determines if the game should end due to too many mistakes.
      Returns:
      true if mistakes exceed the maximum allowed

    • decreaseTime

      public void decreaseTime()
      Decreases the per-word timer down to a minimum threshold.

    • getTimeRemaining

      public int getTimeRemaining()
      Returns:
      remaining time for the current word

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns:
      current score

    • getCorrectWords

      public int getCorrectWords()
      Returns:
      total number of correct words

    • getIncorrectWords

      public int getIncorrectWords()
      Returns:
      total number of incorrect words

    • getTotalTime

      public int getTotalTime()
      Returns:
      total time per word in seconds

    • getLevel

      public int getLevel()
      Returns:
      current mission level

    • isMaxLevelReached

      public boolean isMaxLevelReached()
      Returns:
      true if the max level has been reached
